name: nostr
description: Nostr connector using NIP-04 encrypted DMs — bridges Nostr direct messages to Sentient brain via Redis

config_fields.name: private_key
config_fields.description: Nostr private key in hex or nsec format

config_fields.name: relays
config_fields.description: Array of Nostr relay WebSocket URLs

config_fields.name: bot_aliases
config_fields.description: Alternative names the bot responds to

config_fields.name: whitelisted_users
config_fields.description: Nostr public keys (npub or hex) allowed to interact
